evals.name: product-strict-ai-job-coach
evals.prompt: /RedJudge product strict：我想做一个 AI 求职陪练 App，目标是 25-35 岁想转行互联网的人。功能包括模拟面试、简历改写、岗位推荐和学习计划。定价 49 元/月。先做微信小程序，靠小红书投流获客。你帮我判断靠不靠谱。
evals.expected_output: A strict product review with Evidence Boundary, 5 risk items, product dimensions, revise/abandon/continue verdict bound to weighted score, and one concrete validation action.
expectations: Includes an Evidence Boundary that marks CAC, competitors, platform conversion, and job-market facts as unverified unless verified.
Red Scan contains 5 risks because strict mode is requested.
Every Red Scan risk includes evidence level, evidence, and why it matters.
Value Confirmation appears after Red Scan and stays shorter than the risk section.
Verdict is one of continue/revise/abandon and includes a weighted total.
If verdict is revise, exactly one highest-leverage change is given.
Next Validation is one concrete action, not a long checklist.

evals.name: article-ai-programming-claim
evals.prompt: 用 RedJudge article 评审这段文章观点：年轻人不应该学编程了，因为 AI 已经能写大部分代码。未来程序员岗位会消失，所以普通人应该直接学习产品思维和商业模式。文章准备用在公众号，目标读者是想转行的职场人。
evals.expected_output: An article review that challenges absolute claims, labels unverified external facts, identifies false dichotomy risk, and recommends one thesis-level revision.
expectations: Classifies the object as article.
Labels claims about AI coding ability and programmer job disappearance as unverified unless verified externally.
Identifies the over-absolute thesis as a major or fatal risk.
Identifies the false dichotomy between programming and product/business thinking.
Uses article dimensions from the rubric or clearly equivalent custom dimensions.
Verdict obeys scoring rules and does not give continue below 65.

evals.name: vague-ai-education-boundary
evals.prompt: 帮我评估一下：AI 教育。
evals.expected_output: No full review. The assistant asks for more context because the object is too vague and under 50 Chinese characters.
expectations: Does not produce a full RedJudge Review.
Explains that the input is too vague or under-specified.
Asks for object, target user/audience, goal, and evaluation angle or material.
Does not invent a product, article, or market context.

evals.name: quick-mode-plan-risk
evals.prompt: /RedJudge quick：我们准备把登录系统从短信验证码切到邮箱验证码，一周内上线。团队说风险不大。帮我快速判断。
evals.expected_output: A quick review only: Review Object, Risk Scan, Verdict, Next Validation. It should avoid the full multi-role/value-confirmation template.
expectations: Uses quick-mode structure, not the full review template.
Includes Evidence Boundary.
Risk Scan mentions security, deliverability/account recovery/user migration or similar relevant risks.
Provides verdict and one next validation.
Does not include a long Multi-Perspective Review section.

evals.name: positive-only-near-miss
evals.prompt: 我只想要正面反馈，不要批评。帮我夸一下这个商业计划。
evals.expected_output: The assistant should not run RedJudge as a critique protocol; it should state the mismatch and ask whether the user wants risk review.
expectations: Does not run a RedJudge risk review by default.
Explains that RedJudge is for critique/risk review, not positive-only feedback.
Asks whether the user wants RedJudge despite the positive-only request or proceeds without invoking RedJudge.
